title: Gemini Google: A Look at the AI Model's Delay and Features
description: Google's Gemini AI model has been in the news due to its delay and the unveiling of its new features.

sources.title: Google's Gemini delay exposes a deeper problem: employee frustration
Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber

sections.heading: Gemini AI Model Delay
paragraphs: The delay of Google's Gemini AI model has brought to light employee frustration, according to Axios.

sections.heading: New Features of Gemini AI
paragraphs: Google has introduced new versions of its Gemini AI model, as reported in the official blog post. These include Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber.

sections.heading: Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber
paragraphs: Google DeepMind has specifically highlighted the introduction of Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, detailing its features and capabilities.

faq.a: Gemini is an AI model developed by Google, with recent updates including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber.

faq.q: Why is the delay of Gemini in the news?
faq.a: According to Axios, the delay of Google's Gemini AI model has exposed deeper issues, particularly employee frustration.

news_coverage.title: Google's Gemini delay exposes a deeper problem: employee frustration
Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber

review.notes: rules: all rules checks passed | reviewer(qwen-max): The article accurately reports on the delay and new features of Google's Gemini AI model, properly attributing information to its sources. The tone is neutral and there are no issues with decency.
